response:
*KEEP THE AREA CLEAN*  
BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY TWICE A DAY  
RINSE WITH WATER AFTER EVERY MEAL  
*FLOSS CAREFULLY*  
FLOSS AROUND THE AFFECTED TOOTH  
REMOVE FOOD PARTICLES GENTLY  
*AVOID CERTAIN FOODS*  
STAY AWAY FROM HARD OR STICKY FOODS  
AVOID HOT OR COLD FOODS THAT CAUSE PAIN  
*USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS*  
TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS ARE AVAILABLE  
TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS PROTECT THE TOOTH  
*MONITOR FOR CHANGES*  
KEEP AN EYE ON THE TOOTH FOR ANY CHANGES  
MONITOR FOR INFECTION OR PAIN  
*SEE DENTAL CARE IMMEDIATELY*  
SEE DENTAL CARE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE  
DENTAL CARE IS CRUCIAL TO RESTORE THE TOOTH
